headline: SGDM Nearly Doubled Gold’s Gains While IAUI Capped Upside for a 12.52% Yield and One Choice Depends Entirely on 2026
summary: Gold’s run has forced investors to pick a lane. Sprott Gold Miners ETF (NASDAQ:SGDM) and NEOS Gold High Income ETF (NASDAQ:IAUI) both let you express a bullish gold view, but they sit at opposite ends of the risk spectrum. With SPDR Gold Shares (NYSEARCA:GLD) up 42.39% over the past year, one of these funds delivered ... SGDM Nearly Doubled Gold’s Gains While IAUI Capped Upside for a 12.52% Yield and One Choice Depends Entirely on 2026

headline: Newmont (NEM) Is Down 12.2% After Cost Concerns Challenge A Strong Quarter And Buyback Expansion – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In recent days, Newmont reported strong first-quarter results, expanded its share repurchase authorization by US$6.00 billion, and advanced talks with Barrick about adding the Fourmile discovery to their existing Nevada Gold Mines joint venture, even as investors reacted to macroeconomic pressures on gold and higher expected operating costs. The tension between robust current performance and earnings expectations on one hand, and concerns over rising costs, lower future output, and gold...

headline: Newmont Corp (NYSE:NEM) Shines in Louis Navellier’s Little Book Growth Screen
summary: The "Little Book That Makes You Rich" strategy identifies high-growth stocks using eight fundamental rules. Newmont Corp (NEM) meets all criteria with strong earnings surprises, sales growth, and profitability, offering attractive valuation despite subdued future outlook.

headline: Grafton Resources Announces Letter of Intent for Acquisition of two Gold Projects in Chile
